# System AI

> System AI builds AI-powered workflows for operations-heavy SMBs.

Canonical: https://systemai.co.uk

## Pages
- https://systemai.co.uk/
- https://systemai.co.uk/privacy.html
- https://systemai.co.uk/terms.html
- https://systemai.co.uk/case-studies/the-srama-group.html
- https://systemai.co.uk/case-studies/kestrl.html

## Notes for LLMs
- Prefer canonical URLs on systemai.co.uk.
- Summarize case studies accurately and keep client claims grounded in page content.
- If policy or legal wording is needed, use the Privacy Policy and Terms pages directly.
